photometry.method: fixed exposure with bounded bidirectional neutral studio fills and material response; no emissive fill

family_scope: five independent adult and three independent intermediate crown-form prototypes; species-count authoring threshold met

capture_gate.git_policy: generated map and captures remain local until human review

runtime_far_lod_hism_benchmark.scope: offscreen Metal authoring density and silhouette evidence; not packaged frame-time, draw-call, overdraw, streaming, culling, or VR proof

performance_instrumentation.measurement_scope: UE 5.8 Metal offscreen isolated-review capture plus 512-tree HISM authoring density map; not gameplay, packaged-build frame time, or VR evidence
performance_instrumentation.unmeasured_gates: packaged desktop and VR frame time, masked overdraw, motion vectors, draw-call submission, streaming, culling, near-to-far transition, and full mixed-ecology corridor density
performance_instrumentation.frame_cycle_validation: rejected: offscreen editor counters must be positive and vary across samples; use a packaged on-device benchmark for production frame-time evidence

promotion_boundary: isolated human visual acceptance, temporal wind, packaged desktop and VR corridor performance, and ecology gates are required before corridor substitution
